description_long: This object consists of two mushrooms, each with a vibrant red cap covered in small white speckles, reminiscent of the classic Amanita muscaria. The larger mushroom features a broad, slightly polygonal cap with a gently domed surface and a thick, grayish stem that curves slightly. The smaller mushroom, positioned nearby, has a similarly colored cap but is more hemispherical and compact, with a short, stubby stem. Both caps display a dense pattern of white spots, giving them a distinctive, eye-catching appearance. The stems are smooth and cylindrical, with a subtle gradient from gray to white at the base. The overall look is stylized and clean, making these mushrooms stand out as decorative or thematic elements in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A pair of red-capped mushrooms with white speckles and smooth gray stems, one large and one small, featuring a stylized, vibrant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large mushroom's wide red cap and the smaller mushroom directly in front, both with prominent white speckles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the large mushroom's stem and the smaller mushroom positioned to the left, partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the large mushroom's cap and stem, with the smaller mushroom mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with both mushrooms visible, the smaller one to the right and the large cap's edge clearly defined.
